title: sideritis altiatlantica
intro: Sideritis altiatlantica, also known as the Moroccan ironwort, is a plant species belonging to the genus Sideritis, commonly found in North Africa and the Mediterranean region. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Sideritis altiatlantica include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory health, and exhibit neuroprotective properties. Herbal preparations of Sideritis altiatlantica can be found in teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are traditionally used to treat various conditions, including colds, fever, and digestive issues.
